_meta.title: Battle-Scarred — A '57 Strat Goes Under the Knife
_meta.fixture_purpose: Minimal happy path: prose + image + embed. Smoke-tests the core pipeline.

blocks.html: Elyse Kautz brought a beaten '57 Strat into the shop. The peghead had layers of paint and the neck plate was wrong. Here's how she stripped it back to the original maple.

blocks.alt: Stripped peghead showing carved USA and FLMC letters
blocks.image_text: 001 Chemical stripper revealed letters carved into the maple — "USA" and "FLMC", matching the neck plate.
002 After scraping and sanding, an air-brushed tint made the bare wood look old and worn.

blocks.caption: Acoustic Guitar Builders Club — open discussion checkup.

blocks.html: The full restoration took three weeks. Final pickup wiring next.
